title: Badlands Overhaul
description: This datapack/mod adds cool structures to the empty badlands
body:
![title image](https://i.postimg.cc/9FWfpvRr/title-image.png)

This datapack / mod adds new Structures to the empty Badlands Biome.

Since the badlands biomes are very empty when it comes to structures, I've created this mod which generates villages and pyramids in a badlands-style. All structures contain barrels with loot you won't leave behind!

Current Structures:
- Badlands Pyramid that has a secret redstone trap
  
![The Badlands Pyramid with redstone trap](https://i.postimg.cc/Xq8q2tPn/pyramid.png)

![inside of the badlands pyramid](https://i.postimg.cc/FzyvGc7c/2025-03-07-21-43-53.png)

![secret redstone trap](https://i.postimg.cc/K4hz8xg7/redstonetrap.png)

- Badlands Village

![badlands village](https://i.postimg.cc/zvcHswCB/villageoverview.png)

![The Big Barn building in the village](https://i.postimg.cc/Nj0BtKK8/big-barn.png)

- Badlands Witch Hut with Piston door

![witch hut outside](https://i.postimg.cc/T3StXSjV/witch-hut-outside.png)

![witch hut](https://i.postimg.cc/2j2tqqjS/witch-hut-inside.png)


Village Loot:
![village barn loot](https://i.postimg.cc/8PQFmQyQ/lootbigbarn.png)

![loot small hut](https://i.postimg.cc/L80gfqwv/loothut.png)

Pyramid Loot:

![loot pyramid](https://i.postimg.cc/76bV0GxN/lootpyramid.png)

Witch Hut Loot:

![witch hut loot](https://i.postimg.cc/PxZXMBy2/witch-hut-loot.png)
